name: Chocolate Cheesecake-Kcbx-tv (Audra Mccoy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Oreo cookies in a blender, food processor, or rolling pin until they are crumbly.
2. Melt the butter or margarine and mix with the crushed cookies. The mixture should be crumbly.
3. Press the cookie mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Mix the sugar, eggs, cream cheese, and Amaretto liqueur in a bowl until smooth.
5. Pour the filling into the crust and bake at 300°F for 50 minutes.
6. Melt the baking chocolate and blend with sour cream to desired sweetness.
7. Slowly add milk to achieve pouring consistency.
8. Spread the topping on top of the cooled cheesecake.
9. Chill in the refrigerator until set.
10. Top with toasted almonds, some dyed red food coloring, and chocolate curls.
From KCBX-TV (PBS) - Fall Fund Raising Drive Winner
